meta.title: Nadeuri — Seoul Metro Accessibility Facility Live Status
meta.description: Check real-time operating status of accessibility facilities including elevators, escalators, and more across 300+ Seoul Metro stations on lines 1-9 and Ui-Sinseol.
meta.shortDescription: Check real-time status of Seoul Metro accessibility facilities including elevators and escalators.

about.title: Data Sources & Transparency
about.description: Nadeuri provides real-time subway accessibility data via the official Seoul Open Data API.
about.subtitle: Transparent and reliable information
about.body1: Nadeuri collects and delivers operating status of Seoul Metro accessibility facilities. You can check the status of 5 types of real-time facilities: elevators, escalators, moving walks, wheelchair lifts, and safety boards.
about.body2prefix: All information shown on Nadeuri comes from the official API of
about.body2suffix: . Our automated collection system refreshes data every 90 minutes.
about.body3: Facility status is collected automatically every 90 minutes. Faults or maintenance information is reflected at the next collection cycle, so there may be discrepancies with on-site conditions.
about.accuracyBody: We strive to provide accurate information, but on-site conditions may change faster. Sudden failures can take up to 90 minutes to be reflected. When in doubt, please verify with station staff.

routePage.title: Route Guide
routePage.description: Optimal route guide for mobility-impaired users on Seoul Metro, considering elevator and escalator availability.
routePage.body: An optimal route guide for mobility-impaired users is coming soon. Routes will consider the availability of elevators, escalators, and other accessibility facilities.

archive.title: Data Archive
archive.description: Browse historical records of Seoul Metro accessibility facility operations.
archive.body: Historical operation records for accessibility facilities will be available soon. We will transparently share fault history, uptime trends, and more.

footer.source: Connected to Seoul Open Data Plaza
